description: Harness is a software delivery platform for CI/CD, infrastructure automation, feature management, artifact management, and related engineering workflows. It also provides AI-assisted tooling and agent features for working with the platform.
summary: Harness exposes a platform REST API, an MCP server for AI agents, and the `hc` CLI; all documented developer surfaces require Harness-issued authentication, primarily Harness API-key-backed tokens, with SCIM APIs also supporting a JWT mode.

packages.runtimeHint: Go-based standalone CLI installed via shell script
